title: Can execution-path tracing be standardized across federation nodes as a trust verification mechanism?
abstract: Analysis of: Can execution-path tracing be standardized across federation nodes as a trust verification mechanism?. Faculties: agent_governance, agent_physics, agent_health. Method: cross_domain. 3 findings from 513 local + 8 federation sources.
